description: Default capability set for the Termixion main and settings windows: PTY command/channel core permissions plus trmx-48 auto-update (updater/process), external-link opening (opener), the trmx-51 cross-window settings/update events, and the trmx-54 start-dragging grant (not in core:window:default) that makes the settings window's data-tauri-drag-region chrome actually drag.
